message:
feat(e2e): add Prometheus metrics endpoint E2E tests (process_triage-jhvm)

24 tests across 5 modules:
- prometheus_format: HTTP 200, content-type, HELP/TYPE lines, no duplicates
- metric_values: build_info, counters, gauges, histograms, labels, uptime
- health_endpoint: /health, /healthz (200), unknown paths (404)
- configuration: custom path, default values, serialization roundtrip
- stability: multiple scrapes, graceful shutdown
- naming_conventions: pt_ prefix, _total suffix, unit suffixes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
